name: Support payment method policy example
answer:
Customers can change the payment method for a subscription within 7 days before the next invoice is issued.
Customers can change the payment method for a subscription within 30 days before the next invoice is issued.
Support automatically refunds any invoice when the payment method changes.

sources.title: Support Payment Method Policy
sources.content:
Customers can change the payment method for a subscription within 7 days before the next invoice is issued.
Payment method changes require account-owner verification.
